summary: ISS-827 sigma_distance vs SNR conflation was already fixed by the decider in the current text (the problematic 7-sigma punch line was replaced with a structural unfalsifiability argument). EXP-137 provides four targeted enhancements: (1) dome verbatim rationale quoted for proper steel-manning, (2) W001 missing noise_floor field noted, (3) direction_correct computation paradox added (dome code computes direction it claims is meaningless), (4) explicit 0.8 nT precision derivation. These close the remaining c2 curmudgeon holes without changing the argument structure. Recommend applying as a patch to the existing paragraph.
